get.description: Returns a complete list of all supported collateral assets on the Boros platform. Each asset includes its token address, symbol, name, decimals, icon URL, and current price. Use this to display asset selectors, resolve token metadata, or look up collateral information.

200.description: Complete list of all supported collateral assets with metadata and pricing

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all available perpetual futures markets. Each market includes its configuration, current state, oracle info, and real-time pricing data such as best bid/ask APR from the order book.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to skip.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return. The parameter is capped at 100.

200.description: A paginated list of markets with their current state and configuration

400.description: Invalid query parameters (e.g., skip or limit out of range)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of executed trades for a specific market, ordered by timestamp descending. Each trade includes the execution price (tick/APR), size, side, and transaction hash.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to skip.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return. The parameter is capped at 100.

200.description: A paginated list of executed trades for the specified market

400.description: Invalid marketId or query parameters

get.description: Returns OHLCV (Open, High, Low, Close, Volume) candlestick chart data for a specific market. Supports configurable time frames and date ranges. Useful for rendering trading charts and analyzing historical price action.

parameters.name: timeFrame
parameters.description: TimeFrameType { FIVE_MINUTES : 5m, ONE_HOUR : 1h, ONE_DAY : 1d, ONE_WEEK : 1w }

parameters.name: endTimestamp
parameters.description: End timestamp (Unix seconds), default to current timestamp

200.description: Array of OHLCV candlestick data points for the specified market and time range

400.description: Invalid marketId, timeFrame, or timestamp range

get.description: Returns detailed information for a single market identified by its numeric ID. Includes market configuration, oracle addresses, IM/MM parameters, current state, fee rates, and real-time order book pricing.

200.description: Full market details including configuration, state, and pricing data

400.description: Invalid marketId format

404.description: Market with the specified ID was not found

get.summary: Get market order books by tick
get.description:
**Deprecated: use V2 (`/v2/markets/order-books`) which supports optional AMM liquidity inclusion.**

Returns aggregated order book data for a specific market grouped by tick size. The response contains long (bid) and short (ask) sides, each with arrays of price levels showing implied APR and total size at that level.

See [Order Book mechanics](https://docs.pendle.finance/boros-dev/Mechanics/OrderBook) for tick-to-rate conversion and matching rules.

200.description: Order book with long and short sides aggregated by the specified tick size

400.description: Invalid marketId or tickSize

get.summary: Get market order books by tick (v2, recommended)
get.description:
Returns aggregated order book data with optional AMM liquidity inclusion. When AMM liquidity is included, the response merges on-chain AMM positions into the order book. Maximum 50 entries per side when AMM is included. Supersedes V1 by adding the `includeAmm` parameter.

See [Order Book mechanics](https://docs.pendle.finance/boros-dev/Mechanics/OrderBook) for tick-to-rate conversion and matching rules.

parameters.name: includeAmm
parameters.description: Include AMM liquidity in the order book. When true, AMM positions are merged into the book. Maximum 50 entries per side when enabled.

200.description: Order book with long and short sides, optionally including AMM liquidity

400.description: Invalid marketId or tickSize

get.summary: Get deposit from wallet to margin account calldata
get.description: Generates the transaction calldata for depositing collateral from a wallet into a margin account. This is a sensitive action that requires the user to sign and submit the transaction directly. The returned calldata should be sent to the contract address specified in the 'to' field.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: BigInt string of the deposit amount

400.description: Invalid deposit parameters (e.g., invalid address, unsupported token, or zero amount)

get.description: Generates calldata for a vault to pay treasury fees. This is a sensitive action requiring the user to sign the transaction directly.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: BigInt string of the treasury payment amount

400.description: Invalid parameters (e.g., invalid address or amount)

get.description: Generates calldata to request a withdrawal from a margin account. Withdrawals in Boros follow a request-finalize pattern: first submit a withdrawal request, then finalize it after the cooldown period. This is a sensitive user-signed action.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: BigInt string of the withdrawal amount

400.description: Invalid withdrawal parameters or insufficient balance

get.summary: Get cancelled withdraw from margin account to wallet calldata
get.description: Generates calldata to cancel a pending withdrawal request. Use this if you want to abort a withdrawal that has been requested but not yet finalized. This is a sensitive user-signed action.

400.description: Invalid parameters or no pending withdrawal to cancel

get.description:
Generates calldata to approve an agent address to trade on behalf of the user's account. Once approved, the agent can execute non-sensitive actions (placing orders, transfers) without requiring the user's signature for each transaction.

See [Agent Trading guide](https://docs.pendle.finance/boros-dev/Backend/agent) for the full setup workflow.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Account ID (0-255)

400.description: Invalid user address, account ID, or agent address

get.description: Generates calldata to revoke a previously approved agent's permissions. After revocation, the agent can no longer execute actions on behalf of the user's account.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Account ID (0-255)

400.description: Invalid user address, account ID, or agent address

get.description: Generates agent-executable calldata for transferring cash between cross and isolated margin accounts. This is a non-sensitive action that can be executed by an approved agent. Returns an array of calldatas that may include a pay-treasury step if payTreasuryAmount is specified.

parameters.name: payTreasuryAmount
parameters.description: bigint string of amount to pay treasury

parameters.name: isDeposit
parameters.description: true if you want to transfer cash from cross to isolated account, false vice versa

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: BigInt string of the transfer amount

200.description: Transfer cash between cross and isolated account

400.description: Invalid transfer parameters or insufficient balance

post.summary: Get place multiple limit orders contract params
post.description:
Generates agent-executable calldata for placing one or more limit orders. Supports both single orders and bulk orders (multiple orders per market with optional cancellations). This is a non-sensitive action that can be executed by an approved agent.

See [Best Practices](https://docs.pendle.finance/boros-dev/Backend/best-practices) for bulk order recommendations.

400.description: Invalid order parameters or malformed order request body

get.description: Generates agent-executable calldata for cancelling one or more orders. Supports cancelling specific orders by ID or all orders on a market. This is a non-sensitive action that can be executed by an approved agent.

parameters.name: payTreasuryAmount
parameters.description: bigint string of amount to pay treasury

parameters.name: orderIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated order ids to cancel (ignored if cancelAll is true)

400.description: Invalid parameters, market expired, or mismatched marketAcc and marketId

get.summary: Get add liquidity single cash to amm contract params
get.description: Generates agent-executable calldata for adding single-asset liquidity to an AMM pool. Specify the net cash amount to deposit and the minimum LP tokens expected (slippage protection). Returns execute params including the calldata and target account ID.

parameters.name: payTreasuryAmount
parameters.description: bigint string of amount to pay treasury

parameters.name: netCashIn
parameters.description: BigInt string of net cash to add as liquidity

parameters.name: minLpOut
parameters.description: BigInt string of minimum LP tokens to receive

200.description: Add liquidity single cash to amm contract params

400.description: Invalid parameters or insufficient balance for liquidity provision

get.summary: Get remove liquidity single cash from amm contract params
get.description: Generates agent-executable calldata for removing liquidity from an AMM pool and receiving cash. Specify the LP amount to remove and the minimum cash expected (slippage protection). Returns execute params including the calldata and target account ID.

parameters.name: payTreasuryAmount
parameters.description: bigint string of amount to pay treasury

parameters.name: lpToRemove
parameters.description: BigInt string of LP tokens to remove

parameters.name: minCashOut
parameters.description: BigInt string of minimum cash to receive

200.description: Remove liquidity single cash from amm contract params

400.description: Invalid parameters or insufficient LP token balance

get.summary: Get enter exit markets contract params
get.description: Generates agent-executable calldata for entering or exiting markets on a cross margin account. Entering a market allows the account to trade on it; exiting removes the market from the account's active list. Returns an array of calldatas for the agent to execute.

parameters.name: isEnter
parameters.description: true to enter markets, false to exit markets

400.description: Invalid market IDs or account parameters

get.description: Generates agent-executable calldata for paying treasury fees on an account. Treasury fees accrue from trading activity and must be paid periodically. Returns an array of calldatas for the agent to execute.

400.description: Invalid parameters (e.g., invalid marketId or amount)

get.description: Returns all available funding rate symbols across supported exchanges. Each symbol includes the asset name, exchange, and underlying rate source. Use this to discover which funding rate markets are available for trading.

200.description: List of all available funding rate symbols with their exchange and asset info

post.description:
Returns settlement summary data for specified markets. Includes historical funding rate settlements, aggregated by market, with total settlement amounts and rates. Useful for analyzing funding rate history and settlement patterns across markets.

See [Settlement mechanics](https://docs.pendle.finance/boros-dev/Mechanics/Settlement) for how funding payments work.

200.description: Settlement summaries for the requested markets

400.description: Invalid market IDs in request body

get.summary: Get liquidation events, sorted by timestamp descending
get.description:
Returns a paginated list of liquidation events, sorted by timestamp descending. Each event includes the liquidated account, market, liquidation price, size, penalty amount, and the liquidator address. Useful for monitoring market health and liquidation activity.

See [Margin mechanics](https://docs.pendle.finance/boros-dev/Mechanics/Margin) for liquidation rules and health ratio.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return. The parameter is capped at 2000.

200.description: Paginated list of liquidation events sorted by most recent first

400.description: Invalid query parameters

get.summary: Deposit collateral to isolated/cross margin account
get.description: Simulates depositing collateral from a wallet into an isolated or cross margin account. Returns the projected account state after the deposit, including updated balances and margin ratios. Use this to preview the effect of a deposit before generating calldata.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: BigInt string of the deposit amount

400.description: Invalid parameters (e.g., invalid address, unsupported token, or zero amount)

get.description: Simulates withdrawing collateral from a margin account back to the wallet. Returns the projected account state after withdrawal, including updated margin ratios. The simulation will fail if the withdrawal would cause the account to be under-margined.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: BigInt string of the withdrawal amount

400.description: Invalid parameters or withdrawal would cause under-margining

get.description: Simulates transferring cash between a cross margin account and an isolated market account. When isDeposit is true, cash moves from cross to isolated; when false, from isolated to cross. Returns the projected state of both accounts after the transfer.

parameters.name: isDeposit
parameters.description: true if you want to transfer cash from cross to isolated account, false vice versa

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: BigInt string of the transfer amount

400.description: Invalid parameters or insufficient balance for transfer

get.description:
Simulates placing a limit order on a specific market. Returns the projected account state including new margin requirements, estimated fees, and the order details. Validates tick/slippage constraints, market expiry, and minimum order value before simulation.

See [Margin mechanics](https://docs.pendle.finance/boros-dev/Mechanics/Margin) for how initial margin is calculated.

parameters.name: side
parameters.description: Side { LONG : 0, SHORT : 1 }

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: bigint string of size

parameters.name: tif
parameters.description: TimeInForce { GOOD_TIL_CANCELLED : 0, IMMEDIATE_OR_CANCEL : 1, FILL_OR_KILL : 2, ADD_LIQUIDITY_ONLY : 3, SOFT_ADD_LIQUIDITY_ONLY : 4 }

400.description: Invalid order parameters, market expired, or order value below minimum

get.description: Simulates closing an active position on a specific market. Internally creates a counter-order to close the position. Returns the projected account state after the position is closed, including realized PnL and updated margin requirements.

parameters.name: side
parameters.description: Side { LONG : 0, SHORT : 1 }

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: bigint string of size

parameters.name: tif
parameters.description: TimeInForce { GOOD_TIL_CANCELLED : 0, IMMEDIATE_OR_CANCEL : 1, FILL_OR_KILL : 2, ADD_LIQUIDITY_ONLY : 3, SOFT_ADD_LIQUIDITY_ONLY : 4 }

200.description: Returns close active position simulation result

400.description: Invalid parameters, market expired, or no active position to close

get.summary: Add liquidity single cash to amm
get.description: Simulates adding liquidity to an AMM pool using a single cash deposit. Returns the projected LP token amount to be received and the updated account state. The netCashIn represents the USD amount of cash to provide as liquidity.

parameters.name: netCashIn
parameters.description: BigInt string of net cash to add as liquidity

200.description: Returns add liquidity single cash to amm simulation result

400.description: Invalid parameters or insufficient balance for liquidity provision

get.summary: Remove liquidity single cash from amm
get.description: Simulates removing liquidity from an AMM pool and receiving a single cash asset. Returns the projected cash amount to be received and the updated account state. The lpToRemove represents the amount of LP tokens to redeem.

parameters.name: lpToRemove
parameters.description: BigInt string of LP tokens to remove

200.description: Returns remove liquidity single cash from amm simulation result

400.description: Invalid parameters or insufficient LP token balance

get.description: Retrieves the current account settings for a specific user address and account ID. Settings include user preferences such as display configurations and notification preferences.

400.description: Invalid user address or account ID

post.description: Updates the account settings for a user. This endpoint is protected by agent signature verification - the request must include a valid signature proving ownership of the account. Only the account owner can modify settings.

400.description: Invalid settings data

get.description: Returns the current gas balance for the specified user address. The gas balance is used to pay for on-chain transaction execution fees when orders are matched or positions are liquidated.

400.description: Invalid user address format

get.description: Returns a paginated history of gas consumption events for the specified user. Each entry includes the gas amount consumed, the transaction that consumed it, and the timestamp. Ordered by most recent first.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return. The parameter is capped at 100.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to skip.

400.description: Invalid user address or pagination parameters

get.description: Returns deposit and withdrawal transfer logs for a user's account. Includes transfers between wallet and margin accounts, filtered by the specified criteria. Each log entry contains the token, amount, direction, and transaction details.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to skip.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return. The parameter is capped at 100.

400.description: Invalid query parameters

get.description: Returns a paginated list of limit orders for a user's account. Supports filtering by market ID, active/inactive status, and order type. Results can be sorted using the orderBy parameter. Each order includes its current status, fill amount, and price details.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to skip.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return. The parameter is capped at 200.

parameters.name: orderType
parameters.description: OrderType { LIMIT : 0, MARKET : 1, TAKE_PROFIT_MARKET : 2, STOP_LOSS_MARKET : 3 }. Comma-separated for multiple values (e.g., "0,1,2")

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: Sort by field: 1 for ascending, -1 for descending. Allowed fields: blockTimestamp, side, placedSize, unfilledSize, impliedApr, status, orderType. Default to blockTimestamp:-1

400.description: Invalid query parameters or unsupported orderBy field

get.summary: Get the transactions of a user for a market, ordered by timestamp descending
get.description: Returns a paginated list of trading transactions for a user on a specific market, ordered by timestamp descending. Includes trades, liquidations, and settlements. Each transaction contains detailed execution info such as price, size, and PnL impact.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return. The parameter is capped at 2000.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to skip.

parameters.name: fromBlockNumber
parameters.description: Filter transactions from this block number

parameters.name: toBlockNumber
parameters.description: Filter transactions up to this block number

parameters.name: isLimitOrderTrade
parameters.description: Filter to only limit order trades

400.description: Invalid query parameters

get.summary: Get the settlements of a user for a market
get.description:
Returns a paginated list of funding rate settlements for a user's account on a specific market. Settlements occur periodically and reflect the funding payments between long and short positions.

See [Settlement mechanics](https://docs.pendle.finance/boros-dev/Mechanics/Settlement) for how funding payments work.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return. The parameter is capped at 100.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to skip.

400.description: Invalid query parameters

post.summary: Get market acc infos by marketAccs
post.description:
Returns detailed account information for one or more market accounts (marketAccs). Each result includes the account's positions, margin status, open orders, and balance details. Accepts an array of marketAcc addresses in the request body.

See [Glossary](https://docs.pendle.finance/boros-dev/Backend/glossary) for how to construct a marketAcc.

400.description: Invalid marketAcc addresses

get.summary: Get entered markets for a cross market account
get.description: Returns the list of markets that a cross margin account has entered and not yet exited. Only applicable to cross margin accounts. Entering a market is required before trading on it with a cross margin account.

200.description: Returns markets that the user has entered and not exited. Only suitable for cross marketAcc.

400.description: Invalid marketAcc address

get.description: Returns OHLCV (Open, High, Low, Close, Volume) candlestick data for charting. Supports multiple time intervals and configurable date ranges. Each candle includes the period timestamp, OHLCV values in APR terms, and trading volume. Commonly used for rendering TradingView-style charts.

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Interval in seconds. Must be one of: 300 (5m), 3600 (1h), 86400 (1d), 604800 (1w)

200.description: Array of OHLCV candlestick data for the specified market and time range

400.description: Invalid marketId, interval, or timestamp range

get.description:
Returns the expiry timestamp of an agent's authorization for a specific user account. Agents are external addresses approved to execute non-sensitive trading operations on behalf of a user. The expiry time indicates when the agent's approval will expire and need to be renewed.

See [Agent Trading guide](https://docs.pendle.finance/boros-dev/Backend/agent) for the full agent lifecycle.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Account ID (0-255)

200.description: The Unix timestamp when the agent authorization expires. Returns 0 if the agent is not approved.

400.description: Invalid user address, account ID, or agent address

proSymbol.description: Asset name used in the pro trading interface

tokenId.description: Asset tokenId used for MarketAcc packing

base.description: Base liquidation incentive factor (bigint string, 18 decimals). See docs: https://docs.pendle.finance/boros-dev/Contracts/CustomTypes#liqsettings

slope.description: Slope factor that scales liquidation incentive as health ratio decreases (bigint string, 18 decimals)

feeRate.description: Liquidation fee rate charged to the liquidated account and collected by protocol treasury (bigint string, 18 decimals)

maxOpenOrders.description: Maximum number of open orders allowed per account on this market

hardOICap.description: Hard open interest cap for the market (bigint string)

takerFee.description: Taker fee rate applied to market orders (bigint string)

kIM.description: Initial margin factor (bigint string). Higher values require more margin.

kMM.description: Maintenance margin factor (bigint string). Account is liquidated below this threshold.

maxRateDeviationFactorBase1e4.description: Maximum rate deviation factor in basis points (base 1e4)

closingOrderBoundBase1e4.description: Closing order bound in basis points (base 1e4)

loUpperConstBase1e4.description: Limit order upper constant bound in basis points (base 1e4)

loUpperSlopeBase1e4.description: Limit order upper slope bound in basis points (base 1e4)

loLowerConstBase1e4.description: Limit order lower constant bound in basis points (base 1e4)

loLowerSlopeBase1e4.description: Limit order lower slope bound in basis points (base 1e4)

status.description: On-chain MarketStatus enum: 0=PAUSED (no trading), 1=CLO (close-only, position-reducing orders only), 2=GOOD (normal operations). See docs: https://docs.pendle.finance/boros-dev/Contracts/CustomTypes#marketstatus

useImpliedAsMarkRate.description: Whether to use implied rate as the mark rate instead of oracle rate

maxLeverage.description: Maximum leverage of the market. For example: 20

defaultLeverage.description: Default leverage of the market. For example: 10

notionalOI.description: Total notional open interest across all positions in USD

markApr.description: TWAP (Time-Weighted Average Price) APR of the market, used as the mark rate

lastTradedApr.description: APR of the most recent executed trade on this market

bestBid.description: Best bid (highest buy) APR from the order book

bestAsk.description: Best ask (lowest sell) APR from the order book

ammImpliedApr.description: AMM implied APR derived from the current AMM pool state

longYieldApr.description: Long yield APR (mark APR minus floating APR)

marketId.description: Numeric market identifier used for MarketAcc address packing

tokenId.description: Collateral token ID used by this market

imData.description: Immutable market data set at creation (name, symbol, maturity, tick parameters)

config.description: Current market configuration including fees, margin parameters, and oracle settings

extConfig.description: Extended configuration including AMM settings and settlement parameters

metadata.description: Market metadata including display name, leverage settings, and asset info

data.description: Real-time market data including volume, open interest, and pricing

size.description: Trade notional size in USD. Positive for long (buy), negative for short (sell)

o.description: Open APR value for the candlestick period

h.description: Highest APR value during the candlestick period

l.description: Lowest APR value during the candlestick period

c.description: Close APR value for the candlestick period

v.description: Trading volume in USD during the candlestick period

u.description: Underlying APR from the reference oracle

mr.description: Mark rate (fair value APR) used for margin calculations

ofr.description: Oracle funding rate from the external data feed

b7dmafr.description: 7-day moving average of the realtime funding rate

b30dmafr.description: 30-day moving average of the realtime funding rate

fp.description: Future premium (difference between market APR and underlying APR)

results.description: Array of candlestick data with OHLCV, mark rate, underlying APR, and funding rate metrics

ia.description: Implied APR values at each tick level in the order book

sz.description: Notional size as bigint strings at each corresponding tick level

data.description: ABI-encoded transaction calldata to be included in the transaction data field

from.description: The sender address that should sign and submit this transaction

to.description: The target contract address to send this transaction to

gas.description: Estimated gas limit for the transaction as a decimal string

calldatas.description: Array of ABI-encoded calldata strings to be executed sequentially by the approved agent

size.description: BigInt string of the order size

tif.description: TimeInForce { GOOD_TIL_CANCELLED : 0, IMMEDIATE_OR_CANCEL : 1, FILL_OR_KILL : 2, ADD_LIQUIDITY_ONLY : 3, SOFT_ADD_LIQUIDITY_ONLY : 4 }

slippage.description: Slippage tolerance as a decimal (0 to 1)

ids.description: BigInt string order ids to cancel

isStrict.description: Whether to enforce strict cancellation (fail if any order cannot be cancelled)

sizes.description: BigInt string array of order sizes

tif.description: TimeInForce { GOOD_TIL_CANCELLED : 0, IMMEDIATE_OR_CANCEL : 1, FILL_OR_KILL : 2, ADD_LIQUIDITY_ONLY : 3, SOFT_ADD_LIQUIDITY_ONLY : 4 }

slippage.description: Slippage tolerance as a decimal (0 to 1)

calldata.description: ABI-encoded calldata for the agent to execute on the target contract

accountId.description: The account ID that this calldata should be executed against. The agent uses this to route the call to the correct margin account.

periodTimestamp.description: Settlement timestamp in seconds (always aligned to the hour, modulo 3600 = 0)

marketAcc.description: The market account identifier (packed address and tokenId)

prevPositionRate.description: The position APR rate before liquidation

prevPositionSize.description: The position notional size before liquidation

postPositionRate.description: The position APR rate after liquidation

postPositionSize.description: The position notional size after liquidation

blockNumber.description: The block number when the liquidation occurred

size.description: The notional size of the liquidated position

rate.description: The mark APR rate at liquidation time

tradeRate.description: The APR rate at which the liquidation trade was executed

collateralBalance.description: Bigint string representing the collateral balance of the account

maintenanceMargin.description: Bigint string representing the maintenance margin requirement

marginRatio.description: Margin ratio of the account (collateral / maintenance margin)

minReceived.description: Bigint string representing the minimum amount of collateral received after deposit

collateralBalance.description: Bigint string representing the collateral balance of the account

marginRatio.description: Margin ratio of the account (collateral / maintenance margin)

collateralBalance.description: Bigint string representing the collateral balance of the account

maintenanceMargin.description: Bigint string representing the maintenance margin requirement

marginRatio.description: Margin ratio of the account (collateral / maintenance margin)

marketEntranceFee.description: Bigint string representing the market entrance fee charged for entering a market

takerOtcFee.description: Bigint string representing the taker OTC fee charged for taker-side trades

vaultDepositFee.description: Bigint string representing the vault deposit fee charged when depositing into the vault

vaultWithdrawalFee.description: Bigint string representing the vault withdrawal fee charged when withdrawing from the vault

crossAccState.description: Pre/post state of the cross-margin account during the cash transfer

isolatedAccState.description: Pre/post state of the isolated-margin account during the cash transfer

size.description: Bigint string representing the matched position size

cost.description: Bigint string representing the cost of the matched position

filledVolumeIncentiveReward.description: Incentive reward earned from filled order volume, denominated in PENDLE

provideLiquidityIncentiveReward.description: Incentive reward earned from providing liquidity, denominated in PENDLE

preUserInfoActivePositionSize.description: Bigint string representing the active position size before placing the order

marginRequired.description: Bigint string representing the margin required to place this order

liquidationApr.description: APR at which the position would be liquidated. Undefined if no liquidation threshold exists

priceImpact.description: Price impact of the order as a decimal fraction

actualLeverage.description: Actual leverage of the position after the order is placed

makerOrderReward.description: Maker order rewards earned in PENDLE tokens

collateralBalance.description: Bigint string representing the collateral balance of the account

marginRatio.description: Margin ratio of the account (collateral / maintenance margin)

totalLp.description: Bigint string representing the total LP token balance

lpAmountInCollateral.description: Corresponding collateral amount of LP tokens denominated in collateral units

netLpOut.description: Bigint string representing the net LP tokens received from adding liquidity

netCashUsed.description: Bigint string representing the net cash amount used to add liquidity

fees.description: Bigint string representing the total fees charged for adding liquidity

collateralBalance.description: Bigint string representing the collateral balance of the account

marginRatio.description: Margin ratio of the account (collateral / maintenance margin)

totalLp.description: Bigint string representing the total LP token balance

lpAmountInCollateral.description: Corresponding collateral amount of LP tokens denominated in collateral units

netCashOut.description: Bigint string representing the net cash received from removing liquidity

fees.description: Bigint string representing the total fees charged for removing liquidity

settingsByMarket.description: Per-market leverage settings for the account

actionType.description: Action type that consumed gas (e.g. deposit, withdraw, trade)

gasFeeV2.description: Gas fee in USD (always positive), same as gasFee

fundType.description: FundType { Wallet : wallet, CrossAccount : cross_account, IsolatedAccount : isolated_account, AMM : amm }

amount.description: The transfer amount as a bigint string in the settlement token

status.description: Transfer status { Pending : pending, Success : success, Failed : failed }

isRateImproved.description: Whether the order was filled at a better rate than the limit price

isClosePosition.description: Whether the order is intended to close an existing position

placedSize.description: Original notional size of the order as a bigint string

unfilledSize.description: Remaining unfilled notional size of the order as a bigint string

impliedApr.description: The fixed APR of the order (deprecated, use tick instead)

tick.description: The price tick of the order on the order book, representing the discrete rate level

marginRequired.description: Margin required to maintain this order as a bigint string

isCross.description: Whether the order uses cross-margin mode

status.description: Limit order status { Cancelled : 1, FullyFilled : 2, Expired : 3, Purged : 4, Filling : 0, Pending : 5, Executing : 6, Retrying : 7, Failed : 8 }

orderType.description: Order type { LIMIT : 0, MARKET : 1, TAKE_PROFIT_MARKET : 2, STOP_LOSS_MARKET : 3 }

marketAcc.description: Encoded account position identifier combining root, accountId, marketId, and tokenId

side.description: The trade side: long or short. { LONG : 0, SHORT : 1 }

tradeSize.description: Absolute bigint string of notional size (always positive)

tradeRate.description: The implied fixed rate (APR) at which the trade was executed

tradeValue.description: Bigint string of the total trade value in the settlement token

fee.description: Bigint string of the trading fee charged

pnl.description: Bigint string of realized profit and loss from the trade

isLimitOrderTrade.description: Whether this trade was executed as a maker via a limit order

orderId.description: The order id, only present for limit order filled/partially filled trades

marketAcc.description: Encoded account position identifier combining root, accountId, marketId, and tokenId

side.description: The position side at time of settlement { LONG : 0, SHORT : 1 }

positionSize.description: Bigint string of the position size at time of settlement

positionValue.description: Bigint string of the position value at time of settlement in the settlement token

yieldPaid.description: Bigint string of the yield amount paid by the position holder during this settlement period

yieldReceived.description: Bigint string of the yield amount received by the position holder during this settlement period

settlement.description: Bigint string of the net settlement amount (yieldReceived - yieldPaid)

settlementRate.description: The annualized settlement rate applied during this settlement period

size.description: The remaining unfilled order size as a bigint string

rate.description: The limit rate (APR) of the order as a bigint string

signedSize.description: The signed position size as a bigint string (positive for long, negative for short)

positionValue.description: The current position value as a bigint string in the settlement token

liquidationApr.description: The APR at which the position would be liquidated, as a bigint string

initialMargin.description: The initial margin requirement as a bigint string in the settlement token

maintMargin.description: The maintenance margin requirement as a bigint string in the settlement token

totalCash.description: Total cash balance in the account as a bigint string in the settlement token

availableInitialMargin.description: Remaining margin available for opening new positions as a bigint string

availableMaintMargin.description: Remaining margin before liquidation as a bigint string. When this reaches zero, health ratio = 1.0 and the account is eligible for liquidation. See https://docs.pendle.finance/boros-dev/Mechanics/Margin#health-ratio for threshold details

isMatured.description: Whether the market has reached its maturity date
